questions.question: Describe the difference between a 2D convolution and a 2D correlation. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the mathematical operations involved and the effects on image processing.

questions.question: Explain the concept of downsampling in pyramid algorithms. Provide a step-by-step example for a simple pyramid algorithm.
questions.hint: Focus on the downsampling process and its effect on the image resolution.

questions.question: What are the advantages and disadvantages of using the Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) in image compression? Provide examples to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the trade-offs between compression efficiency and image quality.
